att.ppid: PAYG Device ID. Factory set. Field override options.
att.flid: Fleet ID. Factory set. Field override options.

cmd.gstw: GPRS Sleep Time Window in mins
cmd.gctw: GPRS Connect Time Window in mins
cmd.swch: Generic device switch swch = ON | OFF
cmd.read: Last read request of ANY GATT <data> = [opid|...|]
cmd.rptm: Set notification request mode = [0|1|2|3|4], 0: Auto-Periodic | 1 = Request-Response | 2 = Change-Notification

sts.runm: Running mode,1: Self-use,2: Peak-cut,3: Off-grid,4: On-grid,5: Shutdown,6: Diesel,7: Dispatch
sts.wste: Equipment operating status: 0 - Off, 1 - Start, 2 - Running, 3 - Fault, 4 - Alarm, 5 - Charging Prohibited, 6 - Discharging Prohibited
sts.sair: Air conditioner is on: 0 - Off, 1 - On
sts.pvmp: Monthly output electricity of the PV system
sts.pvdp: Daily output electricity of the PV system
sts.pvst: PV connection status,0: No input,1: PV1 only,2: PV2 only,3: Dual-MPPT,4: PV1&2 parallel
sts.tkre: Last token entry response = NEW | REPEAT | ERROR

dta.rsoc: Relative State of Charge,Percentage of fccp
dta.pvtp: Total output power of PV system
dta.pvyp: Annual output electricity of PV system
dta.sstm: Satellite-Synchronized Network Clock time in ISO 8601

dia.dvl1: L1 phase voltage in the grid,unit:V
dia.dvl2: L2 phase voltage in the grid,unit:V
dia.dvl3: L3 phase voltage in the grid,unit:V
dia.dcl1: L1 phase current in the grid,unit:A
dia.dcl2: L2 phase current in the grid,unit:A
dia.dcl3: L3 phase current in the grid,unit:A
dia.dmvl: Maximum single cell voltage, unit: V
dia.dtnu: The serial number of the single-cell battery with the highest temperature
dia.dtlu: The serial number of the battery cell with the lowest temperature
